name: Best Gun
short_description: Best Gun is a light-hearted arcade flight action game featuring both single-player and multiplayer content. Fly (or walk) and take part in fights, mini-games, races, and more.
detailed_description:
Best Gun is a light-hearted arcade flight simulator action game where you control your trusty jet and ride it into battle. Fight many unique bosses, some while piloting your jet high in the sky, and others while walking your jet on the ground in a more souls-like combat style, all on various maps. Check your aerial fighting skills while facing endless waves of hostile jets, and test your speed and control in aerial races. Compete with your friends and bonk them with a baseball bat both in the air and on the ground in up to 8-player multiplayer minigames, races, and more, all spiced up with random events.

Single player

  • Air Bosses
  • Ground Bosses
  • Air Races
  • Endless Waves

Multiplayer

  • Up To 8 Player Multiplayer
  • Air And Ground Minigames, Races, And More
